tagline: We Build Partnerships, Not Just Pools

hero.headline:
55 Years of Pools Built to
Last Generations
hero.subheadline: Since 1970, Downes Swimming Pool Company has been the Northshore's trusted partner for custom pools, expert maintenance, and award-winning craftsmanship. With 90+ employees and 468+ industry awards, we deliver the kind of quality that keeps 95% of our clients year after year.

services.label: Our Expertise
services.headline: Complete Pool Services From<br class="hidden md:block">Design to Maintenance
services.subtitle: From building your dream pool to keeping it pristine year-round, Downes handles every detail so you can focus on making memories in your backyard.

cards.title: Pool Design & Construction
cards.description: Custom freeform pools, naturalistic designs, and indoor installations — built by an award-winning team with 55 years of craftsmanship behind every project.

cards.title: Pool & Spa Maintenance
cards.description: Comprehensive weekly and seasonal maintenance from factory-trained technicians. Our 40+ vehicle fleet means reliable, on-schedule service every time.

cards.title: Pool Restoration
cards.description: Replastering, refinishing, and complete renovations that bring aging pools back to life. We restore what others say needs replacing.

cards.title: Automatic Pool Covers
cards.description: Safety-first automatic covers that protect your family, reduce debris, and cut maintenance time. Professional installation and ongoing service included.

cards.title: Indoor & Outdoor Spas
cards.description: Year-round relaxation with expertly designed hot tubs and spas. Full installation, integration with existing pools, and dedicated maintenance programs.

cards.title: Pool Repairs & Equipment
cards.description: Fast, expert diagnosis for pumps, heaters, filters, and structural issues. Same-day response for urgent problems to minimize your downtime.

how_it_works.headline: Your Pool Project in Three Simple Steps

steps.title: Schedule Your Consultation
steps.description: Tell us about your vision — whether it's a new build, renovation, or maintenance plan. We'll visit your property and provide a detailed, honest quote with no pressure.

steps.title: Our Award-Winning Team Gets to Work
steps.description: With 90+ factory-trained professionals and 40+ service vehicles, your project is handled by one of the most experienced pool teams in the Midwest. On time, on budget.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Pool for Years to Come
steps.description: From opening day through every season, we're your long-term partner. Join the 95%+ of clients who renew with us year after year — because great service keeps you coming back.

about.label: Why Families Choose Downes
about.headline: Three Generations of Pool Excellence — One Family's Commitment
about.description: Lou Downes started this company in 1970 to pay for college after serving as an Army lieutenant. Pools became his life's work. Now led alongside his son Mike, Downes Swimming Pool Company has grown to 90+ employees with a fleet of 40+ vehicles — earning 468+ industry awards along the way. Our over 95% client renewal rate speaks louder than any trophy: we build partnerships that last decades.

features.title: Factory-Trained Technicians
features.description: Every member of our 90+ person team is factory-trained and equipped to handle any pool challenge with precision and expertise.

features.title: 468+ Awards & Counting
features.description: 150+ regional, 300+ Midwest, and 18 international industry awards — more recognition than any pool company in the area.

features.title: 95%+ Renewal Rate Guarantee
features.description: Our clients stay because we deliver. Over 95% renew their maintenance contracts year after year — the ultimate proof of partnership.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. Lasting Value.
pricing.subtitle: Every pool is unique, so every quote is custom. No hidden fees, no surprise charges — just honest pricing from a company that has been doing this for 55 years.

guarantee.headline: Our "Partnership Promise" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not completely satisfied with any service visit, call us and we'll return to make it right at no additional charge. We've maintained a 95%+ renewal rate for decades because we stand behind every single visit. Your satisfaction isn't just a promise — it's the foundation our 55-year reputation is built on.

faqs.question: How long has Downes been in business?
faqs.answer: Since 1970 — that's over 55 years of building, maintaining, and restoring pools across Northshore Illinois, Lake Geneva, and surrounding areas. We're a family-owned company now in our second generation of leadership.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Northshore Illinois, Lake Geneva Wisconsin, Northern Illinois, and surrounding communities. With 40+ service vehicles on the road daily, we cover a wide service area with reliable, on-time visits.

faqs.question: Do you offer maintenance contracts?
faqs.answer: Yes, and our clients love them — over 95% renew year after year. Our maintenance programs include weekly cleaning, chemical balancing, equipment checks, and seasonal opening/closing services.

faqs.question: Can you renovate or replaster my existing pool?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Pool restoration is one of our specialties. Whether it's replastering, retiling, or a full renovation with new features and finishes, our award-winning team will bring your pool back to life.

faqs.question: How do I get started with a new pool project?
faqs.answer: Simply call us at 847-398-7665 or fill out our contact form. We'll schedule a free consultation at your property, discuss your vision and budget, and provide a detailed proposal. From design to the first splash, we handle everything.

testimonials.name: Lance P.
testimonials.text: Always responsive no matter if it is a simple issue or urgent problem. We have had our pool since 1992 and Downes has been there every step of the way.

testimonials.name: Roger H.
testimonials.text: Their execution has been flawless, very responsive for every issue. We have used them for construction, re-plastering, and maintenance for over 10 years.

testimonials.name: Traci H.
testimonials.text: Most professional to deal with. Delivered on time and on budget. You have completely changed my mind and won us over!
